case_title: WONG, CORRINE vs. SAN FRANCISCO UNIFIED SCHOOL DISTRICT et al

docket_entries.description: PERSONAL INJURY/PROPERTY DAMAGE - NON-VEHICLE RELATED, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF WONG, CORRINE AS TO DEFENDANT SAN FRANCISCO UNIFIED SCHOOL DISTRICT DOES 1-10, INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED STATUS CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR          JUL-17-1998 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  MAY-15-1998 STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT DUE ON       JUN-29-1998
PROOF OF SERVICE OSC CALENDAR OF JUN-23-1998, OFF CALENDAR JUNE 23,1998 POS OSC.
CORRESPONDENCE RE: DISMISSAL RECEIVED AND FILED BY PLAINTIFF WONG, CORRINE

STATUS CONFERENCE CALENDAR OF JUL-17-1998, ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR FAILURE TO SERVE DEFENDANT AND FILE PROOF OF SERVICE WITHIN 60 DAYS OF FILING OF COMPLAINT, TO FILE A STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT WITHIN 20 CALENDAR DAYS OF STATUS CONFERENCE DATE (LOCAL RULE 303E4), OSC TO PLTF IN PRO PER. HEARING SET FOR AUG-26-1998 AT 02:30 PM IN DEPT 212 NOTICE SENT BY COURT

OSC CALENDAR OF OCT-07-1998, ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR FAILURE TO SHOW CAUSE WHY ENTIRE ACTION SHOULD NOT BE DISMISSED PURSUANT TO CRC 525. OSC TO PLTF'S IN PRO PER HEARING SET FOR OCT-27-1998 AT 02:30 PM IN DEPT 212 NOTICE SENT BY COURT
ADDED TO PROOF OF SERVICE ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE CALENDAR HEARING SET FOR JUN-23-1998 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPT 212

OSC CALENDAR OF AUG-26-1998, SANCTIONS ORDERED IN THE AMOUNT OF $200.00 FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR AT ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING ON AUG-26-1998, TO FILE POS OBTAIN ANSWER AND OR ENTER DEFAULT AND DEFAULT JUDGMENT OSC AND SANCTIONS TO PLTF'S IN PRO PER WHO IS REQUIRED TO FILE STATUS STATEMENT 20 DAYS PRIOR TO HEARING, PAYABLE ON OR BEFORE SEP-10-1998 CONTINUED FROM AUG-26-1998 TO OCT-07-1998 AT 02:30 PM NOTICE SENT BY COURT
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE
